# Summary

Describe the change and the release-readiness gate or product area it affects.

# Verification

- [ ] Backend tests, lint, typing, and security scan were run where relevant.
- [ ] Frontend tests, lint, and build were run where relevant.
- [ ] Documentation tests were updated when public-beta readiness docs changed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, full manuscripts, full chapters, full AI responses, private URLs, or machine-local paths were added.

# Release Readiness

- [ ] This does not change public-beta readiness gates.
- [ ] This changes public-beta readiness gates and the relevant docs were updated.
- [ ] Residual risks or deferred external setup items are recorded.
